memoryArtifacts.headline: My Maternal 19th. Great Scottish Grandfather, Roderick Mor MacLeod, 5th. Baron of Lewis
memoryArtifacts.description:
Name: Roderick Mor MacLeod, 5th. Baron of Lewis
Born: about 1320 Scotland
Married: before 1340 in Scotland to Margaret MacDonald
Children: (6) Margaret (Mackintosh), Roderick, Torquil, Tormod, Henault …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis於1332年出生時，他的父親Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes42歲，母親Dorothea O Beolan Ross42歲。他於大約1350年與Margaret MacDonald在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1405年6月9日在英國蘇格蘭享年73歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Roderick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. This name was introduced into England, in slightly different forms, first by Scandinavian settlers in the Danelaw and later by the Normans. However, it did not survive beyond the Middle English period. It owes its modern use to a poem by Sir Walter Scott , The Vision of Don Roderick ( 1811 ), where it is an Anglicized form of the related Spanish name Rodrigo, borne by the last Visigothic king of Spain, whose vision is the subject of the poem. It is now also very commonly used as an Anglicized form of two unrelated Celtic names: Scottish Gaelic Ruairidh and Welsh Rhydderch (see respective appendices).

nameMeanings.name: "Ruaidhri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Rory
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name found in Ireland as Ruaidhrí and in Scotland as Ruairidh (see respective appendices). In Scotland this is further Anglicized to Roderick . In recent times, Rory has come into popular general use.

nameMeanings.name: Mor"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis was born in 1332, his father, Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes, was 42 and his mother, Dorothea O Beolan Ross, was 42. He married Margaret MacDonald about 1350, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 June 1405, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis est né en 1332, son père, Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Dorothea O Beolan Ross, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret MacDonald environ 1350, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 juin 1405, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis 1332 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes 42 und seine Mutter Dorothea O Beolan Ross 42. Er hat um 1350 in Scotland Margaret MacDonald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Juni 1405 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret MacDonald circa 1350, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis(이)가 1332년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothea O Beolan Ross(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret MacDonald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 6월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis родился в 1332 г., его отцу по имени Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothea O Beolan Ross, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret MacDonald около 1350 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 июня 1405 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.
